title: LangChain Agent Architecture
description: Interactive p5.js animation of a LangChain agent reasoning loop that dynamically selects and executes tools, with a step-by-step execution log.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Demonstrate how a LangChain agent dynamically selects and executes tools based on a user query, in contrast with traditional intent-based routing.

pedagogical.interactionType: animated simulation with dropdown, buttons, slider, and checkbox
